allow: Bash(python3 -c "import json,sys; d=json.load\(sys.stdin\); da=d['disease_association']; cd=d['cancer_dependency']; print\('OT:', da['overall_score'] if da else None, 'evidence_breakdown:', da['evidence_breakdown'] if da else None\); print\('DepMap pan_essential:', cd['pan_essential'] if cd else None, 'frac:', cd['fraction_dependent_lines'] if cd else None\); print\('Score:', d['priority_score']\)")

hooks.command:
uv run python -c "
import sys, json, subprocess, os
data = json.load(sys.stdin)
cmd = data.get('tool_input', {}).get('command', '')
if 'git commit' in cmd:
    os.chdir('/home/wsobolew/projects/genesis-bio-mcp')
    r1 = subprocess.run(['uv', 'run', 'ruff', 'format', '.'])
    r2 = subprocess.run(['uv', 'run', 'ruff', 'check', '--fix', '.'])
    if r1.returncode != 0 or r2.returncode != 0:
        print('{\"continue\":false,\"stopReason\":\"Ruff linting failed. Fix errors before committing.\"}')  
"
hooks.statusMessage: Running ruff format + check before commit...
